_meta.what: the round-trip PATTERN REGISTRY: triaged delta signatures. roundtrip_diff.py matches every delta against these; recognized ones collapse to a summary, only NOVEL deltas demand reasoning. Append new signatures ONLY after triage (a human/agent verdict) - recognition is mechanical, judgment is not.
_meta.seeded: 2026-07-14 - from the first verified lossless round trip (coverage packet, 36 members)
_meta.match: kind + path regex + optional value_to regex (against the client-side value, JSON-encoded)

signatures.why: the client stamps its TOC version on every aura at export
regionPrototype position/size defaults the client materializes
adjusted-range toggles seeded false by the client (note WA's own typo: Adjusteded)
shared/per-region option defaults the client materializes
aurabar option defaults (bar family + the spark set)
texture/progresstexture option defaults
text region option defaults
the client stamps trigger-combination defaults (activeTriggerMode -10 = first active) on the triggers table
the client INSERTS default subregions (icon +subbackground; bar +subbackground/subforeground); declared ones are preserved - verify by type-aligned member diff, not length
the inserted default subregions themselves
canon-completion fields on subregions the client rounds out
list->dict shape: the client's added string keys (activeTriggerMode) turn a pure trigger array into a mixed table; content compared per-trigger is identical
the client inserts default subregions around declared ones (icon +subbackground; bar +subbackground/subforeground) - triaged 2026-07-14 round trip
canon completes text_font/fontSize as [] (empty table); the client re-types to its real defaults (Friz Quadrata TT / 12). Canon-vs-client default divergence, benign - the client wins
model region option defaults (incl. the stock arthaslichking model path)
border/backdrop family defaults (model + group regions)
dynamicgroup arrangement defaults (sortHybridTable seeded per child)
WA's exporter strips controlledChildren from d and rebuilds from the c array on import - the c list is the authority (confirmed: all 36 children present after import)
text region full defaults (shadow/justify/outline family)
texture region defaults
progresstexture region defaults (crop/angle/texture family)
stopmotion region defaults (the frame-grid family)
